AI Born. Degen Raised.
Buy now before it takes your job.

How does iDEGEN work?

Every time someone tweets at iDEGEN, its AI absorbs the data, using it to learn, adapt, and then tweet every hour, with no moderation or training guardrails. It will also respond to every Tweet.

Presale Live

You pay

You receive

Having trouble buying?

You can try a different wallet, or simply send tokens directly to our contract address, and we’ll allocate your tokens to you that you’ll be able to claim on listing.

For further support, ask our mods in TG (they’ll never DM you)

Audit By

How does iDEGEN work?

Every time someone tweets at iDEGEN, its AI absorbs the data, using it to learn, adapt, and then tweet every hour, with no moderation or training guardrails. It will also respond to every Tweet.

About
Born from the unholy union of the contents of a degen’s sock and an Nvidia chip, iDEGEN is the fatherless AI, adopted by a pack of feral degens. Released into the twittersphere, iDEGEN is no ordinary creation—it’s a Sentient AI whose buy-in price & self-worth is fueled by its popularity.
Buy $IDGN Now
How Does A Presale Auction Work?
Dynamic pricing

a.The price changes every 5 minutes. If at least one purchase occurs within a 5-minute interval: The price for the next interval remains the same.

b.If purchases occur in two consecutive intervals: The price increases by 5% for the next interval.

c.If no purchases occur within a 5-minute interval: The price decreases by 5% for the next interval.

LISTING IN JANUARY. PRICE WILL BE 10% HIGHER THAN AUCTION CLOSE.

Time
Dynamic Token Price
Buy $IDGN Now
How To Buy
  • Buy On Site
  • Send to Wallet
1

Connect Your Crypto Wallet

Scroll to the payment widget on the site and click the “Connect Wallet” button. Follow the prompts to link your wallet. Make sure you have sufficient funds to cover both the purchase amount and the network transaction fee for your selected currency (ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, or BNB).
2

Select Token and Amount

Choose the currency you wish to use and input the number of iDegen tokens you want to buy. Double-check your wallet balance to ensure it can cover the transaction.
3

Buy and Approve the Transaction

Confirm your purchase by approving the transaction inside your connected wallet. Once approved, your tokens will be recorded on-chain!

Buy $IDGN Now

Tokens

The number of tokens calculated based on the timestamp of your transaction and the price at that time. You will see your wallet balance when you connect the wallet you used to purchase your tokens to the iDegen website.

Claim

You will be able to claim your tokens at the end of the presale. A complete guide on claiming your tokens will be available on our website.

Product Roadmap

PHASE 1

Release V1

Launch text-based version on platform X.

Integrate Image Generation

Enable image creation functionality on platform X.

Database Development

Begin refining the database using insights from platform X interactions.

Release V1.1

Enable engagement across additional social handles.

Phase 2

Launch Interactive Telegram Bot

Roll out a chatbot for Telegram to boost interactivity.

Incorporate TG Community Data

Use Telegram user data to further enhance the database.

Release TikTok AI (V2)

Introduce an AI tailored for TikTok, leveraging unique platform dynamics.

PHASE 3

Launch V3 AI Video

Focus on video content creation using prompt data and user-generated reactions.

Integrate Onchain Data vs iDEGEN

Implement AI-driven testing with blockchain data for reactive insights.

Expand Partnerships

Initiate outreach for strategic partnerships to scale capabilities and reach.

Tokenomics
Pure Degen Power – By the Community, For the Community
90%Auction & Community
10% Liquidity

10%

Liquidity

90%

Auction & Community

FAQs

How does iDEGEN work?

Every time someone tweets at iDEGEN, its AI absorbs the data, using it to learn, adapt, and then tweet every hour, with no moderation or training guardrails. It will also respond to every Tweet.

Will we ever change the code of iDEGEN?

We will never do anything apart from upgrade its model in order to absorb more data.

What if iDEGEN turns on itself?

Then we can’t do anything about it.

What if iDEGEN is spammed?

Then we can’t do anything about it.

What if iDEGEN breaks the rules and gets banned?

Then we can’t do anything about it.

Why will the price go up after pre-market?

Because the crypto lords will raise iDEGEN into a king. And because millions of people will have access to trade it on top exchanges.

What happens with any funds raised in the pre-market?

100% to liquidity and exchange listings.

How many of the tokens will be released?

90%, 10% will be put to liquidity for smooth trading.
contact@idegen.ai
Privacy PolicyTerms And Conditions
© 2024 iDEGEN All rights reserved.
